title: Activity & Calendar - No Sync
excerpt: There’s seems to be a disconnect between “Activities” and the Calendar. Although I have seen that it’s possible to sync Google Calendar, the CRM doesn’t sync between its own internal systems. Are there any fixes for this…

posts.author: KC108 (Keith Coomber)
posts.cookedHtml:
There’s seems to be a disconnect between “Activities” and the Calendar. Although I have seen that it’s possible to sync Google Calendar, the CRM doesn’t sync between its own internal systems. Are there any fixes for this? perhaps a different widget? Any suggestions?

Activity---Diary1800×455 63.7 KB

posts.author: MaxKP (Max)
posts.cookedHtml: Same as @KC108 – would be great to get an update on this basic CRM functionality from team Monday!
